title: Private messaging/ group chatting
body: Hi, is there a way for some of us to connect via a private message? For a group chat surrounding a class, would we have to create a new community for it?
author: Juliana T

title: What brings you to this course?
body: Hi there! I'm just curious what brings others to this Abstract Writing course? I've always loved doing research and writing in high school and college, so here I am to blend my current career with that interest.
author: Cristina McCoy, C-TAGME

title: Workload BDI587 AI in business
body: How is the workload of BDI 587 compare to FIN 500 or ACCY 503...?
author: Mana M

title: MADM567&BADM544 together?
body: Anyone had taken BSDM544 & BADM567 together? Does it take about 20 hrs a week?
author: Mana M

title: Class workload ratings
body: I heard there is a link for class workload rating for MBA/MSM. Does anyone have it? TIA
author: Mana M

title: "No Response" over 2k?
body: I absolutely hate it. I would be grateful if anyone knows how to zero this out - I don't even want to use InScribe because of it.
author: Cosima G.

title: How do I leave a channel?
body: How do I leave a channel that I accidentally clicked to join?
author: John Edward Martin

title: Share Reponses?
body: In Inscribe, you can see a user's "Answers," "Share Responses," and "Replies." Answers and Replies seem straightforward enough, but what are "share responses?"
author: Isabella V

title: Hey how do i turn on my notifications for the calendar? i used to know how to do it.
body: I used to be able to do it but not anymore so i just need a little help than maybe I'll have my memory back from what I did last time.
author: Queen N

title: FInished a class but still getting InScribe messages for it. How do I remove myself from the class?
body: Hello I took a critical thinking class and was joined to the InScribe community for it. I finished the class over a month ago now and I am still getting messages from the InScribe community. Is there something I have to do to get removed fromt that group?
author: Adam L

title: Transferring from web to app
body: I’m having issues with my course transferring to the app . It says I am not part of the community even after I use the access code .
author: Desarae S

title: Remove a channel
body: How do I remove a channel so I stop getting notifications for it?
author: Nichole S

title: notification preferences- are they set at profile or community level?
body: Hi- It looks like notifications are set at the profile level. Do they apply to all communities that you are enrolled in? Is there a way to set notification preferences at the community level (if you're in more than 1)? Thanks!
author: Sarah E.

title: How do I get to my group on the mobile app?
body: I recently discovered that I can get inscribe on my phone! That’s really cool, but I don’t know how I can get to my group with the Java foundations and only the Java foundations, can some one help please.
author: Matthaei Sophie

title: Cannot remove personal email from subscription
body: InScribe is sending emails to my personal email, and the unsubscribe link is only for my school email. How do I remove my personal email and keep my school one?
author: ERYK D

title: Automatically add students to channels
body: There is interest in having multiple classes use on InScribe community. For example, all the ECN 211 courses use the same InScribe community. If we create channels for each class, students will have to manually join their class channel. Not all students will do this. Is there a way to automatically add students to a channel?
author: Linda LMS

title: Preview not showing on a new conversation
body: Hello!After starting a new conversation on our workspace, the preview of the content within the initial post did not populate. The preview is available within the email notification but not on InScribe itself. Does an option need to be enabled?Here is what we see:
author: Michael Meacham

title: The post I'm writing disappears if I open and close "Browse by topic..."
body: If I'm writing a question and I want to look at the list of topics in the "Browse by topic..." dropdown list at the top of the screen, when I close the topic list, my post disappears and I have to start over writing it. It happens whether I close the topic list by clicking on "Browse by topic..." again or by clicking outside of the dropdown list. The entire conversation editor is gone, taking my partially-written content with it.I can reproduce this bug 100% reliably on Chrome 99.0.4844.88 on my M1 Mac.
author: Randy C

title: delete a conversation?
body: I posted a conversation to test it out and now want to delete it.  Is this possible?
author: Amy Haas
